title: tectaria distincta
intro: Tectaria distincta is a species of fern, a type of vascular plant that belongs to the family Dryopteridaceae. Traditionally, the plant is used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating various health issues such as fever, inflammation, and digestive problems. The health benefits of Tectaria distincta include its antipyretic, anti-inflammatory, and antibacterial properties, which help alleviate symptoms of fever, reduce swelling, and fight off infections. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and poultices, which are applied topically or taken internally to harness its medicinal properties.
